preamble: The voiced postalveolar affricate [d͡ʒ] can undergo a process of vocalization, where it transforms into a vowel, specifically the close front rounded vowel [y], a shift observed in certain languages.

examples.note: Unconditioned split of Proto-Central Lamaholot *d͡ʒ to y and d͡ʒ.
Sporadic change of Proto-Central Lamaholot *d͡ʒ to y.

sources: Klamer, M. (2017). The Flores-Lembata languages in eastern Indonesia. LOT Publications.
